review_text: The tech canceled our appointment the morning of because he said he could not get in touch with me.  During booking, I notified this guy that I will be working the night shift at my job so I will be unreachable until around the appointment time.  I reached out 30 min before and he said tough luck and I can Reschedule.  ​I called the office and the lady started off rude and said I never had an appointment.  Once she realized she was mistaken and I was able to mention the techs name that conversation went a little better.  BUT, find another company.  There is no reason for these folks to make you the situation worse with bad service.

I called these people before the whole Virus thing started and left multiple messages for them to call me and never got one call back. Ron used to be the owner, but he no longer works here anymore. When he was around this was the best locksmith in town. When I did get a call back they begged me to remove the bad review.

This business was the first one to respond to my request for a locksmith. My husband lost his keys at work and needed his doors unlocked and a new key made. These guys said $140; which was the cheapest quote that I received. REMEMBER: you pay for what you get. It was already shady on yesterday when they were the first person to respond but stated that they could not get to me until 5 hours later and still arrived another hour late on top of that. So obviously they are not the ones to call if you have an emergency lock out, because they can't get to you until 5-6hrs later. ***When they came it took them 2-3hrs to make a new key and it only worked for the ignition, not the doors. When the original key worked for everything and the make and model only uses 1 key. He told me before he left that he could return the next day to place a keyless entry for him for $40. I called him as soon as he left and asked what time could he come on tomorrow. He gave me some excuse about "let me check with dispatch to see what we have going on for tomorrow" (but didn't you just say that you can come on tomorrow, but all of a sudden you are not for sure?). So then my husband called me very upset and explained to me that he felt like they were bs'ing. I then sent a message stated that my husband was upset and if it is anything that can be done.( as you see below but as you can see those messages are surprisingly missing from the other messages but the messaging system is connected. Where did they go?) This now makes sense of why he didn't respond back but instead he called and told me that he would be out for to us for 7am, before his day started. I agreed. I switched my morning appointments around to make this happen as well.***So I contacted them early this morning to see if he wanted to come earlier because he stated that he starts his day at 8am. Because we really appreciated the fact that he was willing to break his neck to get everything completed for us early this morning since he didn't the day before, at least that's what he said he was going to do. Number 1 thing about having a business (I have 4 small businesses) is to build trust. But it obviously sounds like he just didn't want to get out of his bed and uphold the word he promised to us.  Instead wanting us to drive alllll the way out to meet him on the other side of town when that was not the agreement. I was empathizing with them on yesterday because I seen how hard they were trying. But then I realized that my husband was absolutely correct and didn't understand why he was paying for a service (no matter if it was $3 or $300) that could not be completed at 100%. If his original key worked for everything, then why "trained professionals" who get paid to complete a service not be able to replicate the same thing? But then leave, and leave his car doors unlocked? So now we have a key to start it and the doors are unlocked, but the mf is fully accessible because we can't lock the doors? Wtf???You have to do what it takes to get things done to protect your name and whatever service that you provide. Word from the wise: If you're not willing to put in the work and effort, just give it up. This was not a way to do good business at all. On a positive note: they unlocked the car very fast and was very polite.

Won't honor guarantee. I bought an ignition switch for an 03 Honda. Called to confirm i had the right one. Ordered. Received. It didn't fit.  I hired a locksmith to try. It didn't fit. I emailed asking for the refund process. No response. A few days later i emailed again. No response. I called a few days later. They said they had responded to my email but it never went through. They said they dont have a cash refund. I sent them a picture of the refund polivy listed on their website. They said they would have their boss contact me. Crickets. This is a scam website. BEWARE!
They send me a message to give my phone number. I did, nobody called, I called their number, no answer. I guess they don't want my business.

Trash service! Very unprofessional. Lock smith replaced my key that no longer works less than two months and called me stupid. Had to get another key through the dealership which now works when they kept saying the key was not the problem. Asked to speak to manager they hung up three times, will not answer and when I call from a new number they call back several times. Recorded the phones calls of this very unprofessional group and will take actions to make sure I get my refund!

Burglar Alarm Repair NOT!- I just called this company for a Burglar Alarm Repair. I was told when I called that they DO NOT do burglar alarm repair. When I told the woman who answered that their website said they did and read her the paragraph on their website that promoted their excellent alarm repair service and that they need to fix their website - SHE HUNG UP ON ME!!!!check our their claims to do repairs yourself! http://golden-locksmith-tx.com/security-systems/burglar-alarm-repair

That lady was so rude and nasty she hung the phone up in my face and I called back she answered and didn't say anything. I called again and she hung up in my face again! Would not recommend this place!!!!

Liars, unprofessional, and unethical!!!!!  Would give them no stars if possible.  My insurance contacted them at 6:20pm with a 1 hour response time. At 8:30pm my teenage driver is still sitting on the side of the road.  2 calls to pop A lock where hung up on.   Finally spoke to Monica who claims she was a supervisor (but not in Houston).  She stated that there was 1 tech for all of Houston!!!  He had multiple calls and will get to our call "whenever".   When pressed to find another answer beyond we will have the tech call you or let me speak to another supervisor she hung up on me!!!!   STAY AWAY FROM THESE CROOKS!!!!!

Never call this company! I called the Humble pop-a-lock location at 5:56 pm about being locked out of my car.  The lady I spoke with quoted a price of $54 and told me that the estimated response time was 1 hour and that I would receive a call when they were about 10 minutes away. At 6:24 we missed a call from the Humble number and called back. Trina had no idea who had called or what they may have wanted and told me that help would arrive in about 10 minutes. At 7:13, help still had not arrive and I called back and spoke with Micah who asked me to hold and hung up on me.  I then called back and spoke with Angelica who could not find my original call request and told me that there was not one despite me telling her who I had spoken with.  She then told me she would have to re-enter my request and I would have to wait another hour.  At 8:03 we got a message from David at pop-a-lock saying he was sorry, but there was no one to come help me and telling me to Google tow truck and I would be able to find someone who could help me.  Two hours after our original call we are told that no one can help?  That is completely irresponsible. I was sitting at a gas station waiting for two hours for what I thought was a reputable company only to be told to Google tow truck.  Where was that help in the first two hours?

The person who answered the phone had no empathy or concern for my situation.(this is my first time dealing with the company as I don't lock my keys in my car very often)  She wasn't helpful, she seemed  agitated by my call and not once did she ask me how I was doing or if I was ok. I answered the questions that she asked and she quoted me a time of 35 minutes. So we hang up and 30 minutes later I call back to see if there is an update. Because the text message tracker that I received was not showing that the locksmith was moving closer to my location. My phone was almost dead and I wanted to make sure he was still coming. She asked me for the location , so I began to pull up the address on my phone. She yells at me that she " I told you he would be there in 35-45 minutes!!" I have never dealt with a company that yells at their customers. It was completely unprofessional and uncalled for. If I'm paying you for a service, I am expecting you to be courteous, kind, professional, knowledgeable, and patient. When the locksmith got there he was calm and professional. He fixed my issue in less than a minute.

I used this company because of their high rating. I locked myself out of my truck. What i got out of calling this company was a broken steering column, broken hazard lights that won't shut off, and a broken driver's side window. When I tried to contact company for refund, they hung up on me saying the damage wasn't their fault. Who else's fault was it??? All was fine with my truck until ASAP Locksmith touched it.

Shady company! Just want to see how much they can get out of you. I called the company number to ask how much they charged to have someone come open my car door. I gave them the make and model of my vehicle, and was told a tech would call me. They also said the tech would be the one to give me a quote because they set their price. So the tech calls me and says "I'm about 10 minutes away, do you still need someone to come out?" I answered, yes but I need to know how much you are going to charge me. The tech then said he couldn't disclose an amount over the phone. He said he would tell me once he arrived but heard my concern and said he could work with me. RED FLAG. He insisted that he would tell me upon his arrival so I cancelled the service request. The company then calls me to ask me if it was true that I canceled the request and if so why. I told the women that the tech would not disclose a price for the service. She proceeded to say that they could work with my budget and if I would pay $70/75 (I don't remember which), I said no. The women then asked if I could do $50. Mind you this is the same person that told me they didn't set prices that the technicians do.  So I told the women I was not interested in doing business with their company and I did not agree with the way they operated their business. The women then hung up on me. It just does not seem fair that I have to find out or be surprised with how much I have to pay until someone shows up. I would never recommend this company. They seem to just be taking any opportunity to over charge people just because they can.

This company is so unprofessional we had to wait a additional 38 minutes of the time frame. The company did not sympathize or empathize because their technician got pulled over by the police. The manager Kelly was very rude and unprofessional. She called me names and she hung up in my face multiple times I would not recommend this company. If you want to be lied to about how long it will take for you to get service.

ASAP Locksmith was the worst experience. Scheduled an appointment on a Monday evening for 8 AM Tuesday morning. They called to confirm everything @7:30 AM. We waited well over an hour with our locksmith telling us he would be there "any moment". He eventually rejected our calls and sent us to voicemail every time we checked in. The front desk was equally as inappropriate - Jonathan eventually hung up on us when we asked they send another technician out. Hopefully there was follow-up to that because it's my understanding Jonathan doesn't own the business. Our 8 AM appointment turned into us calling Sugar Land Locksmith at 10 AM, and they were out there within half an hour, and I was back in my car five minutes later. Do yourself a favor - DO NOT call ASAP Locksmith and call Sugar Land Locksmith instead. I will never use ASAP Locksmith and would never recommend them. Totally unprofessional and unreliable.
Trash company. the guy hung up on me when I confronted him about somethign I was charged for that they didn't do. Dishonest.

AVOID LOS ANGELES TEAM AT ALL COST! Unprofessional and Unreliable - Request a Different Vendor.This company was assigned to me through my home warranty for a standard lock rekeying service. I was given a 1-4 PM appointment window, but the technician didn't show up until 4:30. I had taken time off work and waited all afternoon, so I was understandably frustrated. When I expressed this, he brushed it off and said the job would go quickly -- yet it still took over two hours to complete six locks.Throughout the visit, the technician was rude, dismissive, and clearly in a rush. His demeanor was unprofessional, and the quality of the work reflected that.Within a week, one of the locks began malfunctioning. I reached out, assuming they would stand behind their work, but was told there was no warranty and never responded again. Overall, this was an incredibly disappointing experience from start to finish. If you're assigned this company through your home warranty, I strongly recommend asking for a different provider. Poor service, zero accountability, and no pride in their work!

Had their tech sent out by our home warranty and there was a "miscommunication". They didn't tell us that someone needed to be on the property at the time of service so we rescheduled. Upon rescheduling, the lady kept calling from a blocked number so it was being sent to voicemail and when I called back she repeatedly said "I've been trying to reach you." No matter how many times I said "I don't care to argue with you I just want to make this appointment." Tech shows up again and started asking why he's even here??? Like what?? lol. So I told him this is a rekey service and he asked for the keys. I gave him the keys and he started arguing with me that I'll be charged a fee for him picking the locks even though I gave him the keys. He then started looking at me and speaking to me like I was utterly stupid so I asked for my keys back and asked him to leave. 1/10000. Do not recommend. I'm sure there's better techs with the company but not worth the gamble in my opinion.

Business must be really good because their service was not. I needed my new house re-keyed and it has Medeco locks. They were the recommended place. I drove approximately 60 miles round trip to show them the key and get the job scheduled. After waiting 5 hours for the locksmith and called and did get a return call. He wanted to know what type of key and lock I had. When I explained that I made a special trip to take the key to the shop he immediately responded, "I never get half the information I need to do a job." He then called back in an hour to explain that they did not have the blanks in stock and he would get them in a day or so. One week later I called to find out what was happening. He returned my call in 20 minutes and said he had called me several days earlier and I had not answered. (They need to get a new excuse --- I have only one phone, a cell phone, and it has a log of all incoming calls --- guess what --- no previous call). Never the less we scheduled another appointment. Upon arrival they had the WRONG blanks. So after 2+ weeks I cancelled my dealings with them. I contacted a competitor yesterday and we had the locks re-keyed this morning. Do your self a favor and find someone else. Their people desperately need training.
He set an appointment, no showed.  Ghosted me even after my follow up requests.  Spend your money where it is appreciated.

So I called them today because I locked my keys in the car. I called and ask for a quote and time frame. They gave me the info I needed. I told them I'll call back if I decide to use their services. 15 minutes later I get a return call and they asked if I still needed them. I replied I'm not sure yet I'm still look--and he hung up on me. So I'm writing today I wouldn't spend a cent with these guys ever! Rude and cannot follow direction/request. AGAIN, I told them I would call them back if I were to use their services.

Negative stars if possible. I just called to ask for a quote and immediately they said "what area are you in?" In which I replied "medical center" and they replied "I can't help you" and hung up. Jerks.

I got a new key fob through this company that stopped working less than a week later, my technician was able to contact me about a review but when I informed of him of my issue, I got no response so, I mean I won't use this company again, so use your own judgement is all I can really say.

I should've suspected something was not right when I called Best Locksmith explaining that my anti theft device The Club is locked and I've lost my key to The Club.  He couldn't understand what is the anti theft device, The Club.  I called Best Locksmith at 4:42pm, was told to text them my address.  It was 7PM, and still they never showed up.  At 7:33pm I texted letting them know it was late and that I want an appointment for the next day at 9:30am.  They said 9am, and they were not there today at 9AM.  At 9:24AM I called to check on the status, they said the technician was finishing up a job and I'm next in line.  11AM, still, no show.  I called again after 11:26AM, and I was told that I didn't picked up my phone and the technician wouldn't be there if I don't pick up the phone.  When I complained about it, the lady allegedly said that I didn't picked up my phone yesterday, and I told them that no-one called me yesterday.  My cell phone doesn't show a missed call for yesterday. They said that today I didn't picked up the phone.  I told them I set up my cell phone that if someone is not on my contact list my phone goes to voicemail, and no employee of theirs left a voicemail.  I set up Best Locksmith on my contact list to make sure I get a call from them.  I've wasted hours waiting for a locksmith, but this company is so unprofessional.  It's ashame a family member highly recommended this company.  I was very disappointed to get poor service from this company.  You can't depend on them when you need them the most.  I've taken my business elsewhere.

best lock smith my butt. this is the worst place ever. i needed a copy of my key desperately so i called the night before to make sure it is 24/7. i know their store won't be 24/7 so i called to ask when are they open. they response was 'we can send someone to the store for you' ok great i will be there at 9:30 in the morning. we exchanged thanks and hung up. the next morning. I arrived at 9:30 am exactly. and guess what the door says 'we will be right back'. confused I called again. really really hard to understand his accent but what i got from that phone call of bad attitude is 'we are all booked today you are not worth us opening the store even if you need a copy of your key go somewhere else' i work from 10 am to 11:30 pm. so waking up early is really hard and going out of my way before work is even harder. that's why i was very grateful for them to open early for me. but agreeing and the backing out when I already got there. That is terrible customer service. everyone who gave them a 5 star is probably opening their car doors or some doors but making keys. I would suggest you go somewhere else too just like what they said. don't expect them to have any special treatment for you. valuable lesson learned.

***Consumer BEWARE***Wow, you guys got me good on this one! Last night while attending a holiday event with my family in Richardson I lost the keys to my truck. I called this company today because I thought it was the same one I used twice over a year ago, looks like scammers bought the name out. Rafael was the owner when I used them and at the time he was a 1-2 man operation. When asking for Rafael, I received the typical "He's no longer with the company." I called this afternoon to have them pop the lock AND MAKE A REPLACEMENT KEY! I have my friend drop me off at my truck in the cold to meet the guy, he pops the lock and charges me 95$! AFTER TAKING MY CARD PAYMENT, he tells me he can't make keys, so the office is going to call me to send the guy who makes keys. He leaves and minutes later I get a call saying the key guy is busy on other jobs and won't be available until tomorrow! There I am stranded in the cold with an unlocked truck, but no key to drive it, and out 95$ for the unlock. I am guessing I was supposed lock my truck again and schedule another appointment tomorrow for another unlocking fee of 95$ plus a charge for them to make a key. The guy on the phone refused to refund my money as his service was of no help, then hung up on me. I have a feeling they prey on people like this quite often. I proceeded to call Lock-Doc and they came out to make a key for a fair price. I asked the tech what they charge to pop a lock and he said 65$. The recent reviews appear to be fake, as they are short, bland, and most of the people have only reviewed this company. Good job guys, I hope you all can sleep at night knowing you pulled a quick one on a combat veteran that served to protect your freedom to scam people in this very way. Consumers, STAY AWAY from this company!
I called for a quote to help a customer who was locked out of her car and told they can't give me a price because they would need to talk to my customer directly. They then hung up on me.

My sister has a 2015 Nissan Altima. The key fob was lost so we called A J Locksmith & Security. The owner said that he was gonna refer us to this guy named Dani to make the fob. So Dani came and completely messed the car up. Now before the key fob was lost the car ran fine. He was all under the hood opening the fuse boxes. I was watching him wondering what he was doing. About 30 minutes into this walked up and asked him what are you doing. He said making the key fob. He then said that the car had electrical issues that we needed to take it to the dealer. I said it was running fine until you got here.  About 5 minutes later he walked up and handed us the fob and a bill for 571 dollars. My sister told him that he quoted 175 he said he had to do all this extra stuff. Long story short we tried to call A J but he wouldn't answer. My sister paid the bill against my advice. I called A J office and they said Dani didn't work for them. But A J sent him out to us.  It was a scam. I wouldnt recommend A J Locksmith for anything. They are a scam artist. Don't use this business. Oh and the car is still not running.

I'm sure these guys are great at what they do, but wow, they need a new admin. She was very brusque and acted incredulous when I requested an estimate (which she refused to give). When I said that I was going to call around and get quotes from other companies, she hung up on me.

We placed an order for a Fort Knox with a 50% deposit OVER 1 YEAR AGO and Bee's Keys refuses to provide us a status. We have called repeatedly over the past year and never get a response with any answer of where our safe is. We went in person to the store and they said the owner would call us the next day. Never heard back from them. We call every few days and are getting no where.  BUYER BEWARE. They have not offered a refund of our deposit nor have they have acknowledged our repeated attempts for a status.  We made a deposit made on 11/1/19 of $1842.95 (proof attached). We were hoping to get this safe since we ordered it to match an existing safe but at this point we consider them keeping our deposit and not providing a product as fraud.

After getting hit on by the keymaker, I come home to test my new keys and one gets stuck in the lock overnight. I tried ice, WD40, and a variety of other online suggestions with no actual solution. It's fine if you want to make friends with customers, but don't get so distracted that you can't make the keys correctly. They never returned my calls to their emergency line, regular voicemails, or emails. I had to call back the next day after patiently waiting for them to call and apologize. I've never had issues with keys from Home Depot or Lowe's. Shameful. Very disappointed in my first and last time using this company.

This guy just said "not interested" when I said "good morning," and then hung up on me. He then proceeded to hang up several times. I eventually got through to him again--I wanted to make sure I was calling the right number, because that felt super unprofessional. Sure enough, it was Mister Key. Maybe he's just grumpy in the morning, but I decided not to give him my business.

Well, After seeing the reviews on yelp I assumed this company was safe to go with.  HORRIBLY INCORRECT!!  When I first called it was like trying to get through to the IRS or DPS......no answers.....long holding time.......and lucky for me they followed it up with short answers as though they lacked the time to take care of my needs.  At this point I am wondering how great their actual onsite service must be to have good reviews.  Would have loved to see it except for the fact that they never showed and when I called back they just asked me to be patient, as though an hour and a half weren't sufficient.  In the end I never did get to see them in action so I guess one star is too much.  I wish I could rate in the negatives so atleast it would be accurate.  Suffice to say that if you go with this company then you truly are a fool and deserve what you get.  Break your window before relying on this horribly ran, unprofessional, poor excuse of a crappy business.  Whomever owns this place should go back to high school and never get into business again.  Your welcome, that advice was free!!

My key broke off inside my lock late at night and I needed a locksmith to come out. I looked up reviews on my phone and Austin Key Guy was very highly rated, so I gave him a call. No answer, so I left a message and sent him a text assuming he'd get back to me soon. I called him several more times over the next 3 1/2 hours and never heard back. I eventually gave up on him and calling another locksmith, who was there 20 minutes after I called them.Never even heard back from Austin Key Guy.
Poor customer service very rude and unresponsive. Zero sense of urgency, don't call if in a rush.

Lost all the fobs for my 2010 Honda Crosstour in a move and, after calling Ran, he was able to come to my house and make me two brand new keys in under an hour. Great bedside manner, friendly, and great conversationalist. Very reasonable price too consider what other companies wanted to charge me (almost twice as much). Wouldn't call anyone else if I need a locksmith in the future. Great guy. Uber professional.

Called and talked to what I believe was an answering service since they couldn't give me a price to unlock a car and was told a tech would call me within 5 min to let me know the price and when they could arrive. Never received a call back and needed up reaching out to another locksmith. I then called back and explained I had not received a call and that I ended up calling someone else. The lady then said she could someone out and it would would be $95 to unlock the car, I then reiterated that I had to call someone else, she again asked if I would like to have someone come out. I asked to talk with Zach and she stated that he was out today but partners with someone else. That's why I believe it was an answering service and not listening to customers. I would not recommend this company unfortunately. I run a small business in round rock and try to use other small business's in the area and I am sure each would like to know about this interaction.

I called to schedule an appointment and received his voicemail. He called me back within five minutes. I got it scheduled on the day I wanted and his one hour window timeframe worked for me.Billy was competent and pleasant. I would have given 5 stars but he arrived a few minutes after the hour window and of course I had been in the vacant house waiting the entire hour. More my problem than his. I will use him again. His prices are okay. They are pretty much in line with the other re-key companies out there.

Didn't call. Didn't show. I even double checked my information to make sure it was accurate. They have a 4 hour window and stillI would not recommend them obviously. Thankfully a fellow Yelp reviewer recommended another local one in the area.

One of the worst customer service experiences ever. Initially, they were not responsive and it took me almost 2 weeks just to schedule an appointment. Then when it came to the actual appointment, they went to the wrong house. Then they told me they couldn't come back that day because I wasn't there.... Later, they called back, telling me they would come back and that they could only come back the same day, which was extremely frustrating. I had a relative go in my stead, since I could not get off work. They ended up charging her, even after she explicitly told them the house builder should have paid for the rekey (this was in my contract). I am trying to contact them now to get her money refunded, and they aren't answering or returning my calls. Would definitely not recommend. Get a more competent re-keying service provider!

I have used Mr. Rekey for the past 4 years for my rental properties. I have wasted so much time today on hold on the phone trying to schedule an appointment for a rekey that I am giving up on them. I was on hold 10 minutes the first time I called and then just hung up when they asked to put me on hold again to look up the address. I tried later and quit after 4 minutes on hold without speaking to anyone. Waste of time.

I recently went to Cothron's to have 2 door locks for my Ford F-150 re-tumbled to match my ignition key. They did not have to remove them from the doors, I did this myself. The technician said I needed to leave them so   he could work on them. When I came back to pick them up the bill was $106 !!!  Are you kidding ?!? I've had door locks re-tumbled in the past and it did NOT cost half this much, if it had I would have never returned. It used to be reasonable but not any more!! I had no idea that they were using GOLD tumblers in their locks !! I'm done with you guys and I'm telling all my friends.

I tried to use this company but ran into an difficult person on the phone. I said I wanted to get someone to reinforce my front door and she said "okay" and nothing else.  After a long pause she asked what I meant by that and I told her I wanted to get the front door jam reinforced against being kicked in. She said "okay" again and nothing else.   After a second long awkward silence, I just hung up.  It was like pulling teeth.  I assumed since they are a locksmith company they would have some response when a customer calls wanting a locksmith type service.  I will take my business to a different company since there are plenty of options out there.They may want to talk to her about customer service because she is losing them business.

I called because I was locked out of my home. I called and text my address and was told 45-60 minute wait and it's been 3 hours. No responses after the second call to give my address. I know it's the holidays, I know there's traffic, but if you can't do it, decline the services. I'll never use this person again. He never gave his name but it's the main 647 number. I like giving money to small businesses and this was a disappointment. Don't use this guy!

MOST RECENT EDIT:I've posted a review of this company previously, and due to poor communication and high pricing I had given them a lower rating. However after seeing my review on Yelp, Chris did reach out to remedy the situation. He apologized for the error in communication and even offered to issue a full refund for his most recent work (a basic door knob install).I will say this: Chris seems like a genuinely nice person and I am thankful that he took the time to reach out to me and make things right.(See latest photo: A full refund.) Thank you!
Set an appointment for 11 to 1300 it is now 1738 and no show called and they told me they stopped by and no one answered I was home all day they didn't come by at all I would never use them.
Went for our family walk and found we are locked out of the house.  Called twice and was hung up on twice.  Reviews looked good but in this case a waste of time.

The girl answering the phone is a horrible heartless human being. I stupidly locked myself out of a rental property that I own and manage. I left the keys to the property and my car in the apartment. All I had on me was my phone and I was an hour away from home. I called Martin Locksmith after another locksmith had me waiting outside in the heat and mosquitos for 2 hours. The girl on the phone told me it would take one of her technicians 20 minutes to come help me with my lock and it would cost $75. I said, yes, lets do it. She asked me if my address on my drivers license matched the property address. I said no, I don't live here, I am the landlord of the property. She said without a physical document proving ownership she was not allowed to touch the property. I was getting frustrated because I couldn't think of a way I would be able to get my hands on something that would meet this requirement. I asked if I could email an insurance quote I knew was in my email. She said no it has to be a hard copy, nothing electronic. I was not impressed and I told her that in that case I could not work with her and hung up. I called 3 more locksmiths with no luck of availability. I decided that before my phone battery died I would try to Lyft to a local UPS store and print out a copy of my mortgage that my sister had to email me because I couldn't get into the portal on my phone. I had to set up Apple pay on my phone at the UPS store to pay for the two page print out because I had no money/wallet on me. I paid my stuff, got another lyft and headed back to the apartment. I called Martin Locksmith back again and the same rude girl said that because it was a slow day she sent most of her crew home a half hour early (it was 4:30, they close at 5) I was too late. I told her I took a lyft to get a print out of my mortgage and she refused to help me because earlier I said I could not work with her. I was not calling because of a minor inconvenience, I had a legitimate emergency and this

these people took my money and now won't answer no call but yet if I use a different number will answer but only to hang up when I ask why they took my 500.00 over a month ago and did not one service for me that they got paid for. they are scams,thieves and lie about everything they can do for you only to get your money up front and then block you. I won't my money back .

these people came to my house and took parts from my car and 500.00 said they would be back the next day and then wouldn't answer my calls . I drove to the business at a time they told me to come only for them to lock the doors and leave. it's been over a month now and they still haven't done any shit and still won't answer my calls
wish i could give this a zero stars. i had questions and the individual didnt bother to help me out and hung up on me. beyond rude. go to another locksmith!

SCAMMER ALWAYS WANT TO TURN IT INTO A ARGUMENT.WHEN I EXPLAINED THIS TO HIM IN A CALM PROFESSIONAL TONE... SCAMMERS HANG UP ON YOU. HE WILL FIND OUT SOON ENOUGH THAT HE SCAMMED THE WRONG PEOPLE. We have submitted multiple requests on the their website and called multiple times a day and left messages there as well. They do not answer their website messages or their phone calls. They do not response to their messages left on their website or messages left by phone. This is unprofessional and poor customer service. I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS COMPANY. If you can't respond to a potential client within a week, you don't deserve to be in business. Friends, find some one else.

Best Locksmith ever!! I am 7 months pregnant with a serious case of baby brain and locked myself out of my car. My husband who has the spare key was in a business meeting and was going to be an hour and a half or more before he could come help me. I called Levi and he saved the day!! He was here to help in 25 minutes! He was fast and nice as could be!! Thank you so much!! I will absolutely use them again!! Revised  Review: So the first time I used this company they were awesome, which is why I called them again tonight.  Tonight they failed. Not only did it take him a hour to show up but he  charged me 30% more than the last time. When I questioned the difference in price the young man ignored me and proceeded to charge me the higher price without any explanation. I just wanted to know what merited the change in price. He was not nearly as friendly and had a lot less distance to travel to get to me. I will no longer be calling My Local Locksmith. Do yourselves a favor and just get Triple A, which I'm doing at this moment.

This company is Horrible  I got a key made on May 4 and its going out already I called today to find out what the warranty was and the man at 214-663-2708 told me its past 90 days by 3 days!!! I ask for a copy of the warranty information and he Refused so I called 214 613 1012 ask for a Manager and it was the same guy saying he was the manager I asked for his name he said he didn't trust me and wasn't given me his name then Hung up on me!

Everything was nice and convenient until the locksmith in charge of my request went home and failed to notify anyone on there team that there was a customer that needed help and had an appointment. The Metroplex Locksmith representative who was trusted to orchestrate customers needs over the phone recalled the appointment but offered no answer as to why I had not been contacted over an hour after the appointment. I do not recommend this business.

Bad services ! This guy told me he could come 2 nights ago for $185 , i'm like okay cool . Next thing you know he stops texting back so i text again asking for his eta , he then tells me he can no longer come to program my key to my car , it'll have to wait until tomorrow , which was yesterday . He said he'll be here in between 8:30am/9am . The man stopped texting back , stopped answering the phone , everything . He ignored me 100% . The service is trash ! Very uncommunicative ! And does NOT respond in a timely manner !
If I could give zero stars I would. They came out couldn't do what they claimed and than left with our keys and two days later still won't return calls

I had employee accidentally take the keys to an IT case to Virginia while in Dallas. I called Dallas Safecracker on Saturday around 4pm requesting them to crack open the case. I was informed no service technicians were available, but they could do it Sunday. They were to call me back with a time.  I never received a called, but had stopped looking for alternatives since I found someone that could do it. I called them back at 11am on Sunday to ask when the appointment would be. I was informed that they would not be performing the service since they could not find anybody to do the job. I never received a call and would have never been notified if I had not called them back. Matt the dispatcher said he apologized for not communicating, but an apology leaves me still with a locked case and scrambling on a Sunday. They suggested another company which did not answer when I called and never called me back from my voicemail. I highly recommend if you need work done try to find someone else. They only thing this company has going for them is they answer the phone, but zero service after that.    The cost was going to be high roughly 350 to pick a lock, but I told them cost was not an issue and needed it opened at any cost. Now I can see why only 7 people have left reviews prior to this. It's because they never serviced anyone else.
I have made several attempts to call and text and no response so far 3 days now.  I'm not sure how they work emergency services if they don't respond?

I booked a deadbolt to be installed for a Thurs. At 415p I hadn't heard from anyone so I called the store and they said I was next on the list. I never heard from anyone and no one showed up. At 745p that night I left a voicemail about it on their answering machine. No one called me back. At 4p the next day I called the store again and the person who answered didn't care AT ALL. No apology. Just said the guy must have been delayed. I said my appt was more than 24 hours ago, no one has reached out, and no one bothered to return my VM so I asked them to have a manager call me. Of course no one did and no one ever reached out about the install I had scheduled two days ago. Had I known they were not able to get this done I would've scheduled with someone else. Horrible customer experience.

Contacted Anderson Mill Lock & Key after we locked ourselves out of our house. They were quick to arrive, but the technician was not able to get the door unlocked (even after leaving us with a banged up door handle from trying to pry it open). The technician informed us another locksmith from the company was able to come out and drill the lock to let us in, and he left. We waited 1 hour, attempted to contact the office, and never heard back from anyone.

Consumer beware:  It took a long time to get an appointment to install new home locks.  Technician charged the fee to make the visit to determine the needs, said he'd  schedule the work, and never responded again.  The office staff confirmed they received the initial payment but would not honor their commitment to return, nor return the initial fee.

I scheduled an appointment with dispatch to have a technician meet me between 9-12 p.m. for a front door re-key.  At 12:15 p.m. I called the dispatcher to inquire on the whereabouts of the technician as I  only scheduled the morning off from my job to have the work performed.  Dispatch was unapologetic and dismissive and put me on  hold to follow up with the technician.  After a few minutes she came back on the line and informed me the technician had been detained and would be at my house in 15 minutes.  I explained that I took the morning off from work to expressly deal with the locksmith and that I now had to return to work and could not wait.  I also expressed my frustration at the lack of communication from Cothron's dispatch and all she asked is "so do you want me to cancel the dispatch?"  Really?  I am in a retail based service  industry where we depend on customer satisfaction scores for repeat business.  If this is the way Cothron's responds to unhappy customers, they are in for a lot of negative feedback on yelp and loss of potential business.
Just called and it rang 3 times then disconnected.............is this business open for business?

9:30pm - Back door knob was messed up and needed it fixed immediately since we were having guests over soon. Called A-1 Locksmith who was SUPPOSED to have technicians available til 11pm. No answer...false advertising?Not dependable.

I just called tonight around 7:30 pm on SEP 06, 2014 and wanted service for my vehicle and the girl that answered had the most ridiculous ,unpleasant  attitude that I've ever encountered . Right away she was very condescending FOR NO APPARENT REASON . I'm a first time caller and normally ( you'd get the welcoming greet ) instead I felt as If I bothered her when I called . anyways , I decided to take it with the grain of salt and proceed with the service I wanted ( I needed a key made for my vehicle ) SO she says okay got it and hung up on me . I then called back and said you can cancel my order because I'm not going to give service to a company who doesn't care about their customers ,and she proceeds to argue back with me ( so I got a little out of my character ) and we yelled at each-other . I don't normally complain unless it's a big issue and HER ARROGANCE will bring her and the company  DOWN !!! I guess the folks out here ignore the ignorance but I have a VOICE and I will say what's on my mind . Energy is contagious that's why so many business are Failing today because they do not know how to talk to customers. I guess I'm old fashion ,but I believe that when you're dealing with customers, you should have a SERVANTS HEART . GOOD LUCK ON COACHING YOUR TEAM MEMBER(S)  REMEMBER ...The phone operators who assist your business are the first ones you're customers talk to and if this continues to happen I can guarantee people will continue to look elsewhere .

As a retired Marine Corps career officer, I've come to value a few basic traits in the people I choose to work with. I look for someone who shows up when they say they will, speaks plainly, honors their word, and handles the job efficiently without surprises. That standard has served me well over the years.I found Maddison through a Yelp request that went out to several auto lockout services. A few never responded. Others quoted one price to get my attention, then tried to tack on additional charges. Maddison responded right away. He said he could come out at 9 p.m., but also pointed out that it would cost less if we scheduled for early the next morning. I appreciated the straightforward advice and our clear text communication.The next morning, he arrived exactly when he said he would and charged precisely what he had quoted the evening before. He resolved my lockout quickly and professionally. He also let me know he could replace my lost key fob with an OEM unit, including cutting and programming, at a price well below what the dealership would charge.I'm impressed with this young man and the way he runs his business. The next time I need a locksmith, he'll be my first call.

***DO NOT USE!!!***Called them last Tuesday (8/12/25) to set up an appt for Thursday around noon to get a car key/fob made/programmed, and the guy told me.. no need, just text him on Thursday whenever im ready.. So I did just that, I text him on Thursday (around 1245p) to see how soon he could be there (since that is what he told me to do!) and the damn guy text me back and said earliest he could do is Friday at 10a!! (I moved my schedule around to accommodate a Thursday appt and now he's changed it to Friday!! That shit was annoying, but while inconvenient, I said to myself fuck it, Friday it is then) ....So now, Friday 10a comes and I don't hear from the guy, 1030a comes still haven't heard from him.. so after that I text him to see where he is & if he's still coming.. He texts me back then saying it'll be around 1p now!! So I text him back saying Ok.. (and I also ask what happened to the 10a appt? but the guy never responded)... so now, annoying is starting to turn into getting a little pissed off... (once again I've moved my schedule to accommodate this appt & he's changed the time again!! But yet still, while more inconvenient, I say to myself fuck it again, 1p it is) ....Fast forward, 1p comes, I don't hear from him, 2p still nothing, 3p nothing!!!... Now at that point, im pissed!! I called around and around and finally found someone else!! (bc I needed it before Saturday) ....Still to this day (Wednesday 8/20/25), I have not heard back from that asshole at all!!! Just left me hanging!1 star is too good for him!! If I could leave a ZERO STAR rating, I would!!***DEFINITELY...  DO!  NOT!!  USE!!!***

We had a gun safe that we had misplaced the key.  Contacted Locksmith Express, they said they could drill out the lock.  The technician came and drilled out the lock and then we were able to get inside.  They charged me $221 and said they had to order the lock and would probably be back the next day.  (By the way the invoice appeared to show that we were paying for the lock in advance.)  We never heard from them the next day.  I tried texting the technician, but no response.  I called the next day and they said someone would get back with me.  It took 4 calls that day for someone to get back with me.  Then a man called, who was very RUDE! and stated that they couldn't find the lock so they couldn't help me.  I asked about the invoice and he said, no that was only for the service of drilling out the lock.  I said that was a bit much, so he said he would send me a $150 refund.  Then I asked why did I have to keep calling back several times that day before someone returned my call and he said they were very busy.  I said that maybe they should work on their customer service and he said he didn't have time.  I told him I have a business and I try to call people back within the hour of them calling, but he said he didn't do his business that way.  He was very rude.  A few days later I got a call from a lady at their office asking me where to send the refund, so I gave her my address.  I asked her how much were they sending, she said $50.  I told her the man told me $150, so she said let me call him.  Within a minute, he called me back and said what do you want me to do give you all your money back and do it for nothing.  I said, no but that's what you told me.  The original date for the technician coming to my house was 4-28-2021, to this date, I have never received a refund for anything.  It seems strange to me that he couldn't call me back when I had a problem, but the minute his employee contacted him about a $150 refund, he called me within a minute.  I would definit

I didn't have the key for the tonneau cover for my Hummer H2 SUT. GiddyUp came and removed the lock. He said he needed to take it back to the shop to be able to make the keys. He never returned, even after my multiple attempts to contact him. I don't like giving bad reviews, but I have waited long enough.

Don't even bother with this company. They are totally unreliable. The guy told me he would show up several times and didn't. Terrible communication and finally he did show up and it was 45 after the time I told him I had to leave. Ran all over town trying to connect with this person and was frustrated that he kept saying he would be there and then no showed.

They missed my appointment on Thursday afternoon and wanted to show up later which would've taken the service into the evening. I could not do that, so we rescheduled for Tuesday morning. They entirely missed that as well. One missed appointment during covid times is one thing, but a second missed appointment with no communication at all is simply bad service.

Too bad I cannot give it zero stars. I have been in this area as long as Golden's Keys has and it is NOTHING like it used to be. Charged my wife $75 to unlock her car. They told me my credit card would not go through, yet her debit card went through with no problem. I called my credit card company and was told there was nothing wrong with my card and there had been no request from Golden's Keys. These cheap people will not even pay the credit card fee to be used. 50 years, but NEVER AGAIN!
I really wanted to rate this company a 5. But their lack of communication and follow up is poor.

If I could give Less than one star I would worst service possible, rude and unprofessional. Told they would be there in 25 minutes, after an hour I called to check status and was told it would be another hour. I really felt lied to and the less than professional representative hung up on me, twice. Arrow auto unlock Lubbock Texas showed up in 15 minutes solved my problem asked for $25 and gave him $50 took his business cards into the business giving the restaurant a professional contact for customers needing lock services.

Horrible service. Had a 4:30 appointment. They called at 2:20 and wanted to come then. I was in a meeting and couldn't answer (there was a reason we set up appointment at 4:30).  They left a message that they could be there in 10 minutes and to call back if that worked. I got out of my meeting at 3:35 and heard the message. Didn't call them back because I had missed the time. 4:30 arrived and nobody shows. I called and they said "we called you and nobody answered"They said i needed to set up another time since I missed them. Um, no. I didn't miss our appointed time!

We called and explained we needed a reprogram for keys & parameter reset due to putting in a new body control module. They sent out a tech who couldn't do the job because he doesn't have his own NAFTA password and didn't have the proper equipment. We had to put the old body control module back into the vehicle & program the keys to the it, since he couldn't do the parameter reset. The old body control module has water damage, which was why we did the repair! So it wasted our time & our customer's time. When we asked the tech why he didn't bring what was needed he said "the boss doesn't let that stuff leave the shop." He then told us we could call and let them know when the vehicle would be in Lubbock and they could program the keys and do a parameter reset to the new body control module...... At a DISCOUNT. Really?! I called for a specific job to be done, was assured it could be done, then had to reverse the repair in order to have keys work for the vehicle and instead of offering to fix the mistake or the unpreparedness that cost our customer & us time and money free to make the mistake right, we get offered a discount?!When I asked for the boss's name we were told Josh, but if you call and ask for him, you'll probably be told he's on a run, he doesn't answer calls because of telemarketers.....

Do not take your car here .  I had a car a 2008 Scion tC that I needed the master cylinder replace and I bought the part and they were upset about it .. they said the master Cylinder was bad and then got upset and said abs break was not working because it comes from a junk yard and I told him that I did not want a 1000 dollar bill and then he told me that the bill would be a 1000 dollars and I told him do not fix and he did not hook up the aBs breaks and had me take the car without aBs breaks .. I took it to  another mechanic and ask him to look at it and he call me in a hour and said your car is done .  He explain to me that the other mechanic was trying to rip me off and all they had to do was bleed the breaks and their was nothing  wrong with my  aBs breaks and he  did  not know why they even disconnected  and it did not matter where the aBs breaks come from .  This places takes advantage of people and fixes stuff that don't even need to be fix to get a large bill and they charge me 385 dollars to  do nothing but but a master Cylinder and to disconnect my aBs breaks that did not need to.be disconnected.. run from this place it is dishonest .

Even though they arrived quick and took no time to unlock my car, it took me a while to have them give me back my keys. They've been asking for the title, which should be left a home. They have a sketchy trust issues. It took 20 minutes until we found out I could've shone them that the insurance is in my name. If my keys aren't in the car I wouldn't call them in the first place.Make sure you have a way to prove that the car is yours, so you don't have to deal with a sketchy trust issue like I have with them.

I cannot say enough nice things about this business. My dog locked herself inside my running truck today (Sunday). He came to rescue me in 5 minutes for $20. I actually have AAA and they didn't show up or if they did I was already gone. There absolutely is no better locksmith in Lubbock.  He has rescued me a few times and I'm sure he will in the future. Thanks so much!

I called this company at 9:30 pm on December 22nd to unlock my nephews truck. The person on the phone told me that it would be $19 and 10 minutes. They LITERALLY had our truck unlocked 5 minutes from the time I hung up the phone! We were amazed at how fast they arrived and got the job done. I don't usually take time to write reviews. I expect good service from whoever I do business with but this was the best service I have had in a long time. I gave the guy $8 over the price and would have given him $50 if I had had the cash. It was worth it! Thank you!

Customer called regarding dogs locked in a car. After initial 30-45 minute estimate, dispatcher called back stating technician wanted lunch break, extending wait to 90 minutes to 2 hours. When customer asked if technician could help retrieve dogs, she hung up on me.

Waited over 2 hours after being told 30-40 minute wait. POP A LOCK NEVER CONTACTED ME ABOUT THEM NOT COMING TO HELP OR CANCELING ANYTHING. No technician arrived despite caller checking in after an hour.
Quoted 30-40 minute arrival. After waiting an hour, customer discovered they just decided to cancel my call and refused to serve. No one decided to inform me.
I was put on the schedule for 8:00am and told I would get a call between 6:00am and 7:00am. I never got the call.
I have spoke with five dispatchers and a supervisor and not only got hung up on by the dispatchers but also by the supervisor.
I decided to make a complaint and not only got hung up from the technician but the ASAP company itself hung up on me.

After I hired and paid for the $99 special that ended up being $146.77... I have asked for the inspection... But as soon as these people found out We were not the Property Owner/Manager, this information has been withheld. I have already emailed them, and still nothing.

Customer scheduled a 12:30 PM appointment but experienced significant communication failures. Expected a status call 30 minutes before arrival but never received it. After calling for an update, they were told the technician would arrive an hour late. The situation worsened with multiple subsequent calls: first stating he was 20 minutes away, then revealing he went to the wrong address, and finally deciding to finish another job before arriving. The communication is key especially for keeping your clientele completely informed. Nonprofessional service led them to use dealership services instead.

I have to start by saying how horrible the call service was with this company. I called at night trying to get my vehicle unlocked and was rudely placed on hold. The woman came back on the phone and was very hostile and sounded exhausted to answer my question about the price she quoted me. After not being able to answer my question or unwilling to do so she stated someone would call me back. Later, when my wife called back, the same rude woman answered and this time scolded my wife for wasting their time and then hung up.
Unprofessional, didn't show up when scheduled, refusing to refund after no work has been completed.

Quoted 35 service call 25 up on labor...took them a little over an hour...hands me invoice already charging 65 in labor...reply was 'you got your door open didn't you' that was very unprofessional and just plain rude.
